hero_subtitle: A passive, AI-powered RF detection system protecting airports, borders, and energy facilities from unauthorized drones in real-time.
hero_subtitle_h2: Deep-Tech Drone Detection for Critical Infrastructure
how_subtitle: AI is the core of our system. Here is how we detect threats from raw signals to real-time alerts.
step1_desc: Distributed RTL-SDR sensors continuously and passively scan the 433–900 MHz RF spectrum without emitting any signals.
step2_desc: The core AI model runs directly on the edge nodes, instantly analyzing frequency patterns to classify drone signatures and filter out noise.
step3_desc: Once a threat is classified, the system immediately generates actionable data and NATO-compliant SALUTE reports for security teams.
features_subtitle: Built for real-world deployment with decentralized processing and low-cost hardware.
feature1_desc: Operates with zero RF emissions, making the defense system completely invisible to drone operators.
feature3_desc: Replaces multi-million euro traditional radars with highly affordable, distributed hardware nodes.
feature5_desc: Effectively detects small drones flying under traditional radar coverage near borders and airports.
feature6_desc: Immediate notifications with location and confidence score.
feature7_desc: Easily scalable multi-node architecture for wide-area border and facility coverage.
feature8_desc: Continues to function locally even when internet or power is unavailable.
services_subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for all your aviation monitoring needs
service1_desc: Complete control and monitoring of your designated airspace with real-time data.
service2_desc: Instant notification and response system for critical situations and threats.
service3_desc: Detailed analytics and reporting for data-driven decision making.
about_title: Bridging the Gap in Airspace Security
about_desc1: Traditional radar systems are costly and frequently fail to detect small, low-altitude drones near sensitive infrastructure.
about_desc2: Current Status: Our MVP is fully developed and successfully tested. We are currently in active pilot discussions with Estonian critical infrastructure operators and public institutions to deploy our edge-AI RF systems in real-world scenarios.
about_benefit1_title: AI at the Core, Not an Add-on
about_benefit1_desc: Unlike basic monitoring tools, our system relies on advanced neural networks to classify raw RF data directly on the hardware.
about_benefit2_desc: Edge computing ensures the system continues to detect and classify threats even during network outages.
about_benefit3_desc: Real-time detection without constant cloud dependency.
about_benefit4_desc: 24/7 dedicated support team ready to assist you
cta_subtitle: Discover how our deep-tech detection system can be deployed to protect your facilities.
footer_desc: Advanced RF drone detection and real-time threat classification system for critical infrastructure.Advanced RF drone detection and real-time threat classification system for critical infrastructure.
modal_demo_desc: See how the edge-AI classification works in real-time.
modal_contact_desc: Contact our engineering team to discuss technical requirements.
blog_subtitle: Latest updates on drone threats, RF technology, and infrastructure security protocols.
about_hero_subtitle: Developing SkyGuardian: The low-cost, AI-powered real-time protection system for critical infrastructure.
about_story_p1: Our mission is to close the critical vulnerability gap in lower airspace security. Traditional radar systems are prohibitively expensive and frequently fail to detect small, low-altitude drones near sensitive infrastructure due to ground clutter.
about_story_p2: To solve this, we developed SkyGuardian: a passive RF-based, edge-AI system. It requires no active radar emissions, making it undetectable by drone operators, and works reliably even in challenging weather environments.
about_story_p3: Current Status: Our Minimum Viable Product (MVP) is fully operational. We are currently in active pilot discussions with Estonian critical infrastructure operators and defense entities to deploy our decentralized mesh networks in real-world scenarios.
contact_subtitle: Global support for local airspace security.
upload_text: Tap to browse or drop your CV here
career_p: We are actively expanding our core team of RF engineers, Edge-AI specialists, and embedded systems developers. Help us engineer the next generation of passive drone detection systems.
benefit_4: Hands-on work with cutting-edge SDR & Edge-AI hardware
